emails.subject: JDI Master
emails.body: JDI Master Jennifer, Please see the attached Master Firm Purchase/Sale draft for J.D. Irving, Limited. Should you have any questions, please give me a call. Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490
